hero.alt: HR AI dashboard showing recruitment automation, candidate screening, and interview scheduling analytics

screenCandidates.alt: Screen Candidates Instantly - Mobile-first application process with conversational screening and AI-powered resume matching

scheduleInterviews.alt: Schedule Interviews Automatically - Outlook and Gmail integration with automated reminders and multi-person coordination

candidateExperience.alt: Provide a Magical Candidate Experience - Personalized candidate interactions with 24/7 availability and real-time updates

integration.alt: HR integration dashboard showing seamless connectivity with existing tools and ATS systems

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Thank you for applying to TechCorp Solutions... I’m Olivia, your AI recruiting assistant. I’m here to help with screening, interview scheduling, and application updates — anytime. Shall we get started?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great. Are you applying for the Software Engineer role?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. How many years of professional experience do you have in software development?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you. Which technologies are you most comfortable with?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Got it. Based on your profile, you meet the initial requirements. The next step is a technical interview.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: I see availability tomorrow at three p.m., or the day after tomorrow at eleven a.m. Which works best?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Your interview is scheduled for tomorrow at three p.m.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’ll receive a calendar invite, video meeting link, and interview details shortly. Would you like updates on your application status, or information about company culture and benefits?

transcript.speaker: Candidate
transcript.text: Company culture and benefits would be nice.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. I’ll share that information with you right away. If you need to reschedule or have any questions, you can reach me anytime.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Best of luck, and thank you for your interest in TechCorp Solutions.
